title: How To Connect ChatGPT To Your Channel!

transcript.text: Chat GPT has been a strategist that only sees what you tell it, but you don't 100% know what's going on, which is why you asking Chat GPT. You need to know what YouTube sees. And as of now, you can connect Chat GPT to YouTube to do exactly that. So, to connect this is super simple. All you need to do is open up Chat GPT, go to settings, and then go to [music] apps, and go to browse apps, look up VidiQ, and then just hit [music] connect, and then connect your account, and you are ready to go. VidiQ turns Chat GPT from a brainstorm partner into something that is a live strategy operating system.
